zh.Leslie, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英國蘇格蘭費伏萊斯利
zh.Leslie, Fife, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭費伏萊斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes於1416年9月2日出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Norman Leslie36歲，母親Christian Seton21歲。他於大約1435年與Margaret Lundin結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1490年5月24日在英國蘇格蘭費伏萊斯利享年73歲。

zh-hans.Leslie, Fife, Scotland: 英国苏格兰費伏萊斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes于1416年9月2日出生在英国苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Norman Leslie36岁，母亲Christian Seton21岁。他于大约1435年与Margaret Lundin结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1490年5月24日在英国苏格兰費伏萊斯利享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes was born on 2 September 1416, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Norman Leslie, was 36 and his mother, Christian Seton, was 21. He married Margaret Lundin about 1435. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 24 May 1490, in Leslie, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes est né le 2 septembre 1416, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Norman Leslie, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Christian Seton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Lundin environ 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 mai 1490, à Leslie, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes am 2. September 1416 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Norman Leslie 36 und seine Mutter Christian Seton 21. Er hat um 1435 Margaret Lundin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Mai 1490 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Leslie, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes è nato il il 2 settembre 1416 nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Norman Leslie, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Christian Seton, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Lundin circa 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 24 maggio 1490, nel Leslie, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothesが1416年9月2日にイギリススコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Norman Leslieは36歳，母Christian Setonは21歳であった。約1435年にMargaret Lundinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1490年5月24日にイギリススコットランドフィフレスリーで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes(이)가 1416년 9월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Norman Leslie(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Seton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1435년 Margaret Lundin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 5월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 레슬리에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 September 1416–24 May 1490: 2 de setembro de 1416–24 de maio de 1490
pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes nasceu em 2 de setembro de 1416, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Norman Leslie, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Christian Seton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Lundin aproximadamente 1435. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de maio de 1490, em Leslie, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes родился 2 сентября 1416 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Norman Leslie было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Seton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lundin около 1435 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 24 мая 1490 г. в местности лесли, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.2 September 1416–24 May 1490: 2 de septiembre de 1416–24 de mayo de 1490
es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes nació el 2 de septiembre de 1416, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Norman Leslie, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Christian Seton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Lundin aproximadamente 1435. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1490, en Leslie, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
